title: Create a durable Agent Governance Control Plane packet
persona: AI platform, security, AI quality, and control owners
steps: Open Sprint 1 from the Assistant subnav.
Review the live registry preview, tool scope review, prompt supply-chain summary, memory governance controls, observability signals, certification blockers, and rollback controls.
expected: An AssistantAgentGovernancePacket row is persisted with registry, toolScope, promptSupplyChain, memoryGovernance, observability, certificationPlan, rollbackPlan, and leadershipSummary evidence.
Agent scopes, tool permissions, prompt library records, memory policy, automation policies, and source telemetry are not mutated automatically.

title: Queue certification review for a Sprint 1 packet
steps: Create or select a DRAFT Sprint 1 packet.
Add a certification note describing the downstream approval decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and stores actionQueueItemId.
AssistantAuditEvent states that tools, prompts, memories, automation policies, and source telemetry were not changed automatically.

title: Certify an agent governance packet after human review
steps: Confirm certification blockers and rollback controls are acceptable.
expected: The packet status changes to CERTIFIED and records certifiedByUserId, certifiedAt, and certificationNote.
The action is audit logged as a certification decision.
Certification records the review decision only; it does not automatically expand agent authority, enable tools, approve prompts, write memories, or change automation policy.
